docket_entries.description: ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS)
CHALLENGE TO VENUE FILED BY DEFENDANT LIVINGSOCIAL, INC. C/O CSC - LAWERS INCORPORATING SERVICES

CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED VIA CERTIFIED MAIL FROM PLAINTIFF CASAQ'S IN RESPONSE TO LIVINGSOCIAL, INC. 3/22/13 LETTER RE: REQUEST TO DISMISS FOR IMPROPER VENUE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENES, DARLENE D.B.A. CASAQ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR TRIAL TO APR-23-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE IS DENIED", PER JUDGE MITCHELL.
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED. PERSON APPEARING: JESSIE SUNDAY, EVENT MANAGER LIVINGSOCIAL. FILED BY DEFENDANT LIVINGSOCIAL, INC. C/O CSC - LAWERS INCORPORATING SERVICES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-23-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-23-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JESSIE SUNDAY--EVENT MANAGER LIVING SOCIAL AND MIRIAM CAHAN, WHO APPEARED BY COURT CALL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TENES, DARLENE D.B.A. CASAQ AS TO DEFENDANT LIVINGSOCIAL, INC. C/O CSC - LAWERS INCORPORATING SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED VIA FEDEX FROM DEFENDANT LIVINGSOCIAL IN REFERENCE FOR THE COURT'S DECISION WHETHER TO DISMISS CASAQ'S CLAIM FOR IMPROPER VENUE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-26-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LIVINGSOCIAL, INC. C/O CSC - LAWERS INCORPORATING SERVICES
NOTICE OF VENUE CHALLENGE MAILED TO ALL PARTIES ON 3/26/13.
CORRESPONDENCE RE CHANGE OF VENUE RECEIVED AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENES, DARLENE D.B.A. CASAQ
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED VIA FEDEX FROM DEFENDANT LIVINGSOCIAL IN RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFF CASAQ'S LETTER RE: VENUE CHALLENGE FILED BY DEFENDANT LIVINGSOCIAL, INC. C/O CSC - LAWERS INCORPORATING SERVICES
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) AND DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT LIVINGSOCIAL, INC. C/O CSC - LAWERS INCORPORATING SERVICES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENES, DARLENE D.B.A. CASAQ IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIVINGSOCIAL, INC. C/O CSC - LAWERS INCORPORATING SERVICES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
